actionCalls.name: NAT_Email_AO_for_new_API_trial
actionCalls.label: NAT - Email AO for new API trial

actionCalls.name: NCP_New_Contact_with_PRO_user_type_Admin_User
actionCalls.label: NCP - New Contact with PRO user type Admin/User

value.stringValue: Phone Opt was changed to False

assignments.name: Hard_MQL_Add_Contact_Owner_ID_to_Collection
assignments.label: Hard MQL - Add Contact Owner ID to Collection

assignments.name: Save_Original_Variables_Before_FitScore_Calc
assignments.label: Save Original Variables Before FitScore Calc

decisions.name: Did_we_send_Owner_Change_Email
decisions.label: Did we send Owner Change Email?

decisions.name: Fit_Score_and_Intent_Compare_ISNULL
decisions.label: Fit Score and Intent Compare ISNULL?

decisions.name: Owner_Role_not_Admin_or_Director_MIR
decisions.label: CTOC - Owner Role not Admin or Director MIR?

rules.name: New_Contact_Inbound
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND NOT 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND (7 OR 8) AND 9 AND 10 AND (11 OR 12 OR 13 OR 14 OR 15 OR 16 OR 17 OR 18)
rules.label: New Contact - Inbound

rules.name: New_Contact_Outbound
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND NOT 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND (6 OR 7) AND 8 AND 9 AND 10 AND ( 11 OR 12 OR 13 OR 14 OR 15 OR 16 OR 17 OR 18)
rules.label: New Contact - Outbound

decisions.description: MIS-5724 - Changed CU logic to run on last activity by GTM MIS-5460
decisions.name: Rule_CTR_Converted_CU_Task_Recalculation
decisions.label: *Rule (CTR)* - Converted CU Task Recalculation

rules.name: TTR_Type_B_SF_Admin_Open_Task
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5) AND (6 OR 7) AND ((8 AND (NOT 9)) OR 9) AND (NOT 10)
rules.label: CTR - Type B - SF Admin Open Task

rules.name: TTR_Type_A_Contact_Owner_Open_Task
rules.conditionLogic: (((1 OR 2 OR 3) AND 4) OR (5 OR 6) OR ((NOT 4) AND ((7 AND 8) OR (9 AND 10)) AND 11 AND 12) OR ((7 AND 8) AND (13 OR 14)) OR 15 OR 16) AND 17
rules.label: CTR - Type A - Contact Owner Open Task

decisions.name: Rule_FLU_Found_Latest_Unqualified_Upon_Creation_CU
decisions.label: *Rule (FLU)* - Found Latest Unqualified Upon Creation CU?

rules.name: FSI_FitScore_ISCHANGED
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5) AND 6 AND 7 AND 8 AND 9 AND 10
rules.label: FSI - FitScore ISCHANGED

decisions.description: MIS-5724 - Changed CU logic to run on last activity by GTM MIS-5460
decisions.name: Rule_FTR_FitScore_CU_Task_Recalculation
decisions.label: *Rule (FTR)* - FitScore CU Task Recalculation

rules.name: FTR_Type_B_SF_Admin_Open_Task
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5) AND (6 OR 7) AND ((8 AND (NOT 9)) OR 9) AND (NOT 10)
rules.label: FTR - Type B - SF Admin Open Task

rules.name: FTR_Type_A_Contact_Owner_Open_Task
rules.conditionLogic: (((1 OR 2 OR 3) AND 4) OR (5 OR 6) OR ((NOT 4) AND ((7 AND 8) OR (9 AND 10)) AND 11 AND 12) OR ((7 AND 8) AND (13 OR 14)) OR 15 OR 16) AND 17
rules.label: FTR - Type A - Contact Owner Open Task

decisions.name: Rule_IDBI_ID_BI_Data_Related_record_id
decisions.label: *Rule (IDBI)* - ID<> BI Data. Related record id

rules.name: ID_BI_Data_Related_record_id
rules.label: ID<> BI Data. Related record id

rules.name: Strategic_MQL_Alert_Contact
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3) AND NOT 4 AND NOT 5
rules.label: Strategic MQL Alert - Contact

decisions.name: Rule_NCP_New_Contact_with_PRO_user_type_Admin_User
decisions.label: *Rule(NCP)* - New Contact with PRO user type Admin/User

rules.name: New_Contact_with_PRO_user_type_Admin_User
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2) AND NOT 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND (8 OR 9 OR 10 OR 11 OR 12 OR 13 OR 14 OR 15)
rules.label: New Contact with PRO user type Admin/User

decisions.name: Send_Email_for_Phone_opt_out
decisions.label: Send Email for Phone opt out

rules.name: IS_phone_opt_was_changed_to_false
rules.label: IS phone opt was changed to false

Flow.description: MIS-7783 - Added Account CS Email MIS-7205 - Employee size/Country/Sw Industry to Account MIS-6878 - FitScore Log Updates MIS-6812 - return new contact inbound emails MIS-6893 - Exclude Admin and Director MIR from CU Emails MIS-6812 - remove new contact inbound emails MIS-6372 - Department Update from FitScore Flow MIS-6637 - FitScore Calc Before First MQL Date MIS-6546 - First MQL Date 2.0 - Year 2100 fix MIS-6336 - First MQL Date 2.0 MIS-6259 - MQL Notifications Update 2 MIS-6255 - MQL Notifications Update MIS-6227 - First MQL Date Update MIS-5743 - MQL Notifications MIS-5724 - Changed CU logic to run on last activity by GTM MIS-5529 - first mql date MIS-5691 - temporarily removed sf admin from CU type B scenario MIS-5460 - convert & fitscore update MIS-5503 - owner logic update MIS-5459 - removed status = 'unqualified upon creation' on owner change MIS-5123 MIS-4891 MIS-5149: Remove no touch email MIS-3370: Adujst Alerts for SDR MIS-2791 - Adjusting Contact alerts MIS-2095 - phone opt-out alert MIS-1973 - count of number of qualified contacts MIS-1603 [OB] - NT Updates MIS-2046 MIS-6982-NT USER UPDATES NT ACCOUNT TO TRUE (removed this section)

formulas.description: if fit score is latest → take fit score if intent_first_medium_date__c or intent_first_high_date__c) is later than SW Fit score timestamp → take the earliest between intent_first_medium_date__c or intent_first_high_date__c
formulas.name: Fit_Score_Intent_Compare
fr_body_for_log
formulas.expression: " Business_Unit__c = " + ({!$Record.Business_Unit__c})+", "+ " Clean_Domain__c = " + ({!$Record.Clean_Domain__c})+", "+ " Country = " + ({!$Record.MailingCountry})+", "+ " CountryCode = " + text({!$Record.MailingCountryCode})+", "+ " Department__c = " + {!Var_Save_Department}+", "+ " Calculated_Department = " + {!Get_FitScore.Var_Department}+", "+ " Department_Other_Description__c = " + ({!$Record.Department_Other_Description__c})+", "+ " Email_Address_Domain_Type__c = " + text({!$Record.Email_address_domain_type__c})+", "+ " Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details__c = " + ({!$Record.Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details__c})+", "+ " Employees_Min_FR__c = " + text({!$Record.employees_min_FR__c})+", "+ " Lead Source = " + text({!$Record.LeadSource})+", "+ " Quiz Data Incomplete = " + {!$Record.Quiz_Data_Incomplete__c}+", "+ " ROE_Division__c = " + ({!$Record.ROE_Division__c})+", "+ " Secondary_Email__c = " + ({!$Record.Secondary_email__c})+", "+ " Seniority__c = " + {!Var_Save_Seniority}+", "+ " Calculated_Seniority = " + {!Get_FitScore.Var_Seniority}+", "+ " SI Enrichment Visit = " + text({!$Record.SI_Enrichment_Visits__c})+", "+ " SW_Industry__c = " + ({!$Record.sw_industry__c})+", "+ " Title = " + ({!$Record.Title})+", "+ " Use_of_Similarweb__c = " + text({!$Record.Use_of_Similarweb__c})+", "+ " Website = " + ({!$Record.website__c})+", "+ " LinkedIn Profile = " + ({!$Record.LinkedIn_Profile__c})+", "+ " Website = " + ({!$Record.Website__c})+", "+ " SI_Enrichment_Visits__c = " + text({!$Record.SI_Enrichment_Visits__c})+", "+ " sw_connector_Total Monthly Visits = " + text({!$Record.Account.sw_connector__swId__r.sw_connector__Visits__c})+", "+ " Clean Domain = " + ({!$Record.Clean_Domain__c})+", "+ " ROE_Division__c = " + ({!$Record.ROE_Division__c})

formulas.name: fr_cause_for_log
formulas.expression: IF( ISNEW(), 'Record is new first time getting Fit Score', IF( ischanged({!$Record.MailingCountry }), 'Country changed from ' + {!$Record__Prior.MailingCountry} + " to " + {!$Record.MailingCountry}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.MailingCountryCode }), 'MailingCountryCode changed from ' + text({!$Record__Prior.MailingCountryCode}) + " to " + text({!$Record.MailingCountryCode}), IF( ischanged({!$Record.department__c }), 'department__c changed from ' + text({!$Record__Prior.department__c}) + " to " + {!Get_FitScore.Var_Department}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.Department_Other_Description__c }), 'Department_Other_Description__c changed from ' + {!$Record__Prior.Department_Other_Description__c} + " to " + {!$Record.Department_Other_Description__c}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.Employees_Min_FR__c }), 'Employees_Min_FR__c changed from ' + text({!$Record__Prior.Employees_Min_FR__c}) + " to " + text({!$Record.Employees_Min_FR__c}), IF( ischanged({!$Record.Email_address_domain_type__c }), 'Email_address_domain_type__c changed from ' + text({!$Record__Prior.Email_address_domain_type__c}) + " to " + text({!$Record.Email_address_domain_type__c}), IF( ischanged({!$Record.Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details__c }), 'Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details__c changed from ' + {!$Record__Prior.Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details__c} + " to " + {!$Record.Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details__c}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.Clean_Domain__c }), 'Clean_Domain__c changed from ' + {!$Record__Prior.Clean_Domain__c} + " to " + {!$Record.Clean_Domain__c}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.sw_industry__c }), 'sw_industry__c changed from ' + ({!$Record__Prior.sw_industry__c}) + " to " + {!Get_FitScore.Var_SW_Industry}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.Business_Unit__c }), 'Business_Unit__c changed from ' + ({!$Record__Prior.Business_Unit__c}) + " to " + ({!$Record.Business_Unit__c}), IF( ischanged({!$Record.Secondary_email__c }), 'Secondary_email__c changed from ' + {!$Record__Prior.Secondary_email__c} + " to " + {!$Record.Secondary_email__c}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.website__c }), 'website__c changed from ' + {!$Record__Prior.website__c} + " to " + {!$Record.website__c}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.Title }), 'Title changed from ' + {!$Record__Prior.Title} + " to " + {!$Record.Title}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.Use_of_Similarweb__c }), 'Use_of_Similarweb__c changed from ' + text({!$Record__Prior.Use_of_Similarweb__c}) + " to " + text({!$Record.Use_of_Similarweb__c}), IF( ischanged({!$Record.Seniority__c }), 'Seniority__c changed from ' + text({!$Record__Prior.Seniority__c}) + " to " + {!Get_FitScore.Var_Seniority}, IF( ischanged({!$Record.Quiz_Data_Incomplete__c}), 'Quiz_Data_Incomplete__c changed to ' + {!$Record.Quiz_Data_Incomplete__c}, Null )))))))))))))))))

formulas.name: fr_ForContactsInbound
formulas.expression: IF( OR( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Sales Outbound'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'SDR Outbound'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Deal Registration'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Mass Outbound'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Direct'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Email'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Employee Referral'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'CompeteReferral'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Rank Ranger'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'SimilarTech - Trial'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Sales intelligence'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Outbound'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Outbound - ZoomInfo'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Manual Attachment'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Partnership - Virtual Events'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Partner Contact Us'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Partnerstack - Affiliates'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Partnerstack - Referrals'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Tradeshow'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'ContactForm'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Virtuous B2B'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Webinar'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Webinar On Demand'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Partnership - Content'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Partnership - F2F Event'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Partnership - Webinars'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Investors - Paid'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'LinkedIn - Paid'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'LinkedIn - Paid - Convo Ads'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Internal - F2F Event'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Internal - Virtual Event'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Internal - Webinars'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Facebook - Paid') ), True, False )

formulas.name: fr_ForContactsOutbound
formulas.expression:
IF( OR( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Sales Outbound'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'SDR Outbound'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Mass Outbound'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Deal Registration'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Direct'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Email'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Employee Referral'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'CompeteReferral'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Rank Ranger'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'SimilarTech - Trial'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Sales intelligence'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Partner Contact Us'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Outbound'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Outbound - ZoomInfo'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Manual Attachment'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'ContactForm'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource},'Investors - Paid')
), True, False )

Flow.label: Contact after save

subflows.name: ISC_Upd_Primary_Contact_Inferred_Solution_From_PB
subflows.label: ISC - Upd Primary Contact Inferred Solution From PB

textTemplates.name: CU_Email_Body_Converted
textTemplates.text:
New CU has been submitted:

CU Details:
Status: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task_Converted.Status}
Due Date: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task_Converted.ActivityDate}
CU Type: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task_Converted.CU_Type_formula__c}
Subject: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task_Converted.Subject}
Message: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task_Converted.Description}
Form Location URL: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task_Converted.Form_Location_URL__c}

Contact Details:
Contact Created Date: {!Created_Date}
Full Name: {!$Record.FirstName} {!$Record.LastName}
Pro User Type: {!$Record.fr_Pro_User_Type__c}
Email: {!$Record.Email}
Department: {!$Record.Department__c}
Title: {!$Record.Title}
Phone: {!$Record.Phone}
Fit Score: {!$Record.SW_Fit_Score__c}
How to Contact: {!$Record.how_to_contact_user_primary__c}
LinkedIn Profile: {!$Record.LinkedIn_Profile__c}
Website Domain: {!$Record.Website_Domain__c}

Company Details:
Account: {!$Record.Account.Name}
Account Stage: {!$Record.Account.Stage__c}
Base Product: {!$Record.Account.Base_Product__c}
ARR: {!$Record.Account.fr_ARR__c}
Next Renewal Date: {!$Record.Account.fr_Next_Renewal_Date__c}
Country: {!$Record.Account.BillingCountry}
SW Industry: {!$Record.Account.SW_Industry__c}
Strategic Pod: {!$Record.Account.Strategic_Pod__c}
Strategic Region: {!$Record.Account.Strategic_Region__c}

textTemplates.name: CU_Email_Body_FitScore
textTemplates.text:
New CU has been submitted:
The Fit Score of this Contact has been improved - please follow up on this Contact us form ASAP
CU Details:
Status: {!Get_Latest_Unqualified_Upon_Creation_CU.Status}
Due Date: {!Get_Latest_Unqualified_Upon_Creation_CU.ActivityDate}
CU Type: {!Get_Latest_Unqualified_Upon_Creation_CU.CU_Type_formula__c}
Subject: {!Get_Latest_Unqualified_Upon_Creation_CU.Subject}
Message: {!Get_Latest_Unqualified_Upon_Creation_CU.Description}
Form Location URL: {!Get_Latest_Unqualified_Upon_Creation_CU.Form_Location_URL__c}

Contact Details:
Contact Created Date: {!Created_Date}
Full Name: {!$Record.FirstName} {!$Record.LastName}
Pro User Type: {!$Record.fr_Pro_User_Type__c}
Email: {!$Record.Email}
Department: {!$Record.Department__c}
Title: {!$Record.Title}
Phone: {!$Record.Phone}
Fit Score: {!$Record.SW_Fit_Score__c}
How to Contact: {!$Record.how_to_contact_user_primary__c}
LinkedIn Profile: {!$Record.LinkedIn_Profile__c}
Website Domain: {!$Record.Website_Domain__c}

Company Details:
Account: {!$Record.Account.Name}
Account Stage: {!$Record.Account.Stage__c}
Base Product: {!$Record.Account.Base_Product__c}
ARR: {!$Record.Account.fr_ARR__c}
Next Renewal Date: {!$Record.Account.fr_Next_Renewal_Date__c}
Country: {!$Record.Account.BillingCountry}
SW Industry: {!$Record.Account.SW_Industry__c}
Strategic Pod: {!$Record.Account.Strategic_Pod__c}
Strategic Region: {!$Record.Account.Strategic_Region__c}

textTemplates.name: CU_Email_Body_Owner_ISCHANGED
textTemplates.text:
New CU has been submitted:

CU Details:
Status: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task_Owner_ISCHANGED.Status}
Due Date: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task_Owner_ISCHANGED.ActivityDate}
CU Type: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task_Owner_ISCHANGED.CU_Type_formula__c}
Subject: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task_Owner_ISCHANGED.Subject}
Message: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task_Owner_ISCHANGED.Description}
Form Location URL: {!Get_Latest_CU_Task_Owner_ISCHANGED.Form_Location_URL__c}

Contact Details:
Contact Created Date: {!Created_Date}
Full Name: {!$Record.FirstName} {!$Record.LastName}
Pro User Type: {!$Record.fr_Pro_User_Type__c}
Email: {!$Record.Email}
Department: {!$Record.Department__c}
Title: {!$Record.Title}
Phone: {!$Record.Phone}
Fit Score: {!$Record.SW_Fit_Score__c}
How to Contact: {!$Record.how_to_contact_user_primary__c}
LinkedIn Profile: {!$Record.LinkedIn_Profile__c}
Website Domain: {!$Record.Website_Domain__c}

Company Details:
Account: {!$Record.Account.Name}
Account Stage: {!$Record.Account.Stage__c}
Base Product: {!$Record.Account.Base_Product__c}
ARR: {!$Record.Account.fr_ARR__c}
Next Renewal Date: {!$Record.Account.fr_Next_Renewal_Date__c}
Country: {!$Record.Account.BillingCountry}
SW Industry: {!$Record.Account.SW_Industry__c}
Strategic Pod: {!$Record.Account.Strategic_Pod__c}
Strategic Region: {!$Record.Account.Strategic_Region__c}

textTemplates.name: CU_Email_Subject_Converted
textTemplates.text: You have a new CU by {!Get_Latest_CU_Task_Converted.Email__c} from Account: {!$Record.Account.Name}

textTemplates.name: CU_Email_Subject_FitScore
textTemplates.text: You have a new CU by {!Get_Latest_Unqualified_Upon_Creation_CU.Email__c} from Account: {!$Record.Account.Name}

textTemplates.name: CU_Email_Subject_Owner_ISCHANGED
textTemplates.text: You have a new CU by {!Get_Latest_CU_Task_Owner_ISCHANGED.Email__c} from Account: {!$Record.Account.Name}

textTemplates.name: EmailphoneOptout
textTemplates.text:
Hello,

Phone opt-out field was changed false for {!$Record.FirstName} {!$Record.LastName} was changed by {!$Record.Phone_Opt_out_last_modified__c}.

Please be aware.

textTemplates.name: Soft_Hard_MQL_Notification_Body
textTemplates.text: The Contact {!$Record.FirstName} {!$Record.LastName} has received {!$Record.Mql_Status__c} Status. Please reach out ASAP!
